summary: Iteration 174 testing complete: Updated Aura Colors, God Mode Dashboard, Genesis Minting, 144-Slot Cap. All 22 backend tests passed. All frontend UI elements verified working.
test_credentials: email: grad_test_522@test.com, password: password (Founding Architect, Level 1, Genesis already minted)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 174 features fully working. Test user grad_test_522@test.com is a Founding Architect at Level 1 (Physical) with 174 XP. They have already minted their Genesis item (Transcendent Resonator Key - Legendary). God Mode is accessible because they are a Founding Architect (bypasses Level 5 requirement). 144-slot cap is enforced with 143 slots remaining.

aura_colors.GET /api/consciousness/levels: Returns all 5 levels with updated colors

founding_architect_status.GET /api/founding-architect/status: Returns slots_filled, slots_total (144), slots_remaining, genesis_minted status
founding_architect_status.genesis_minted_field: Returns boolean indicating if user has minted Genesis

founding_architect_redeem.POST /api/founding-architect/redeem: Returns 400 if already a Founding Architect

genesis_mint.POST /api/forge/genesis/mint: Returns 400 if user already minted Genesis
genesis_mint.item_properties: Genesis items are always legendary with 10x stats

god_mode_economy.GET /api/forge/god-mode/economy: Returns economy stats for Level 5 or Founding Architects
god_mode_economy.economy_stats: total_users, founding_architects, architect_slots_remaining, total_forge_items, total_genesis_items, total_marketplace_assets, total_listings

frontend_ui.dashboard_consciousness_panel: Shows Level 1 Physical with amber aura, XP bar (174/500 = 35%), level map with 5 icons
frontend_ui.trade_circle_genesis_tab: Shows 'Genesis Minted' state with checkmark for user who already minted
frontend_ui.trade_circle_god_mode_tab: Shows full economy dashboard with stats grid, distributions, recent activity
frontend_ui.god_mode_stats_grid: Users (81), Architects (1/144), Forge Items (1 Genesis), Marketplace (8)
frontend_ui.consciousness_distribution: Shows L1-L5 user counts with correct colors
